mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id, p.name, p.description, p.customer_id, p.customer_name, p.owner_id, u.realname AS owner_name, p.start_date, p.due_date, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, COALESCE(task_stats.task_count, 0) AS task_count, COALESCE(task_stats.incomplete_task_count, 0) AS incomplete_task_count FROM crm_project p LEFT JOIN manager_user u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, COUNT(*) AS task_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status <> 'COMPLETED') AS incomplete_task_count FROM crm_project_task GROUP BY project_id ) task_stats ON p.project_id = task_stats.project_id WHERE ORDER BY p.update_time DESC NULLS LAST, p.create_time DESC NULLS LAST, p.project_id DESC

SELECT p.project_id, p.name, p.description, p.customer_id, p.customer_name, p.owner_id, u.realname AS owner_name, p.start_date, p.due_date, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time, COALESCE(task_stats.task_count, 0) AS task_count, COALESCE(task_stats.incomplete_task_count, 0) AS incomplete_task_count FROM crm_project p LEFT JOIN manager_user u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT project_id, COUNT(*) AS task_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status <> 'COMPLETED') AS incomplete_task_count FROM crm_project_task GROUP BY project_id ) task_stats ON p.project_id = task_stats.project_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}
